MECHTA Djamila
MECHTA Djamila
Grade:Professeur
Grade:Professeur

Département:Informatique

Bureau:09

Djamila MECHTA
obtained her PhD in Computer Science from Ferhat ABBAS University, Setif-1, Algeria, in 2012.  She is currently an associate professor at the college of Science, Computer Science department, Ferhat ABBAS-University, and member of Network and Distributed Systems
Laboratory (LRSD) since 2014. From 2015 to now, she is the responsible of License
training at the same university. She has published more than 40 Scientific papers in the field of E-learning,
Biometry and wireless Sensor Networks.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
RESEARCH INTERESTS:
Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs)
Internet of Things (IoT)
Internet of Vehicles (IoV)
Vehicular AdHoc Networks (VANETS)
Pervasive Computing and Networking
Data Analysis and prediction models
Telelearning
